# Pull Request

## What

<!-- What does this PR do? -->

## Why

<!-- Why is this change needed? -->

## How

<!-- How was it implemented? Key decisions? -->

## Type of Change

- [ ] `feat` — new feature
- [ ] `fix` — bug fix
- [ ] `refactor` — code change that neither fixes a bug nor adds a feature
- [ ] `chore` — maintenance (deps, configs, scripts)
- [ ] `docs` — documentation only
- [ ] `test` — adding or fixing tests
- [ ] `ci` — CI/CD changes
- [ ] `style` — formatting, no code change

## Testing

<!-- How was this verified? -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes
- [ ] `pnpm lint` passes
- [ ] `pnpm test` passes
- [ ] i18n: any new user-facing copy exists in BOTH `es.json` and `en.json`
- [ ] DB changes ship with a migration (no entity/migration drift)
